sprint.name: Flagship Sprint
sprint.goal: One continuous product push, stretched to a bigger goal: from the shipped Survival Kit to a standalone product business (store /learn/ live, email list, reusable production pipeline) and a launched flagship course. Runs from the real project start (2026-07-08) through 2026-08-11.

tasks.title: Parse corpus into Kit data model
tasks.detail: 127 phrases / 11 categories + 7 game sets + 7 marker groups from corpus_extract_core.json

tasks.title: Survival Kit PDF workbook
tasks.detail: 13-page branded workbook, dark + light themes, clickable trial CTA

tasks.title: Sprint board build + deploy
tasks.detail: This board: sprint.json + kanban page on GitHub Pages, agents push updates

tasks.title: Audio pack (edge-tts)
tasks.detail: 399 MP3s: 127 normal + 127 slow + 127 slower + 11 tracks + 7 game, pt-BR voice, 0 failures. Codex leg: spec in codex-task-T04-audio.md

tasks.title: Package Kit zip + readme
tasks.detail: Both PDFs + audio pack + buyer readme, ready for Payhip upload

tasks.title: Payhip listing copy
tasks.detail: Paste-ready title + description + $19 anchor copy (payhip-listing.md) and product thumbnail with both covers

tasks.title: Kit language QA pass
tasks.detail: Review both PDFs: naturalness, register, accents, answer-key correctness

tasks.title: Payhip account + product upload
tasks.detail: Create free Payhip account, upload zip, enable per-buyer PDF stamping

tasks.title: Landing page buy section
tasks.detail: Kit section on speak-like-yourself with Payhip buy button, dark brand

tasks.title: Starter Pack content build ($49.99)
tasks.detail: Carried from S01 (was 'Starter System assembly'). Track B: the bridge from surviving a conversation to building your own sentences (L2, anchored on Eu). S01 staged only structure/manifest before stalling; now rebuilt through the T20 pipeline once the syllabus lands. Blocked on syllabus + pipeline.

tasks.title: Real review quote on landing page
tasks.detail: Swap blockquote placeholder for an exact named Preply review

tasks.title: Landing analytics
tasks.detail: Track A3. GoatCounter (free, privacy-friendly) + per-pin src tags on index.html + learn/index.html so store visits, free-PDF opt-ins and Payhip button clicks become measurable.

tasks.title: Pinterest developer app
tasks.detail: App created (ID 1587877) on Business account. Privacy policy + URL verification blockers resolved 2026-07-10; app re-review passed.

tasks.title: Pinterest poster: Trial -> Standard upgrade
tasks.detail: Carried from S01. Poster pipeline proven end-to-end (OAuth write scopes granted, tokens saved to .credentials). PARKED: Trial tier cannot create pins in production (403 code 29). Needs a Standard-access application with a demo video (OAuth flow + API call). Waiting on Pinterest, not on us. Manual posting continues meanwhile.

tasks.title: Reddit/Quora question mining
tasks.detail: Weekly note of real questions matching corpus answers; queue-ready for Draft Factory

tasks.title: Opus orchestrator system
tasks.detail: orchestrate.ps1: bus reports -> Opus 4.8 decides -> dispatches codex/hermes/worker/scripts. 2x daily n8n cron + on-demand. Live 2026-07-09.

tasks.title: Activate favorite-capture trigger
tasks.detail: Carried from S01. Preply killed favorite notification emails (push-only), breaking the Gmail fast-responder. Rebuild BUILT (MacroDroid -> Apps Script -> Google Sheet -> n8n Sheets Trigger -> template + Telegram draft + 72h follow-up), files in C:\n8n\Preply. Waiting on Rafael: install MacroDroid, deploy Apps Script, import workflow.

tasks.title: Deploy /learn/ store separation
tasks.detail: Track A1. git push web/ so the standalone store /learn/ goes live. Verify store renders, Payhip button works, zero Preply CTAs, assets 200, no mobile horizontal scroll. index.html stays teaching-only.

tasks.title: Email list: $0 opt-in + welcome email
tasks.detail: Track A2 (#1 compounding asset). Payhip $0 product for survival-phrases.pdf (captures email + delivers + unifies list). Swap free-PDF href + Starter Pack notify CTA in learn/index.html to the $0 URL. Welcome email introduces the ladder, soft-pitches the Kit.

tasks.title: Reusable production pipeline + content schema
tasks.detail: Track A5, highest-leverage parallel build. Generalize the Kit's one-off tooling into a parametrized pipeline driven by one content JSON: workbook generator (dark+light PDFs), edge-tts audio batch (3 speeds + category tracks, TTS only), gallery/thumbnail generator, reusable Payhip listing + buy-section HTML component. Deliverable: documented content-schema so syllabus output plugs straight in. Fable5 handoff owner.

tasks.title: Store polish: SEO, OG, favicon, a11y, mobile
tasks.detail: Track A4. learn/index.html: SEO title/meta, Open Graph + Twitter share image so pins/links preview well, favicon, accessibility pass, mobile QA. Make the store shareable and findable.

tasks.title: Bundle scaffolding + checkout cross-sell
tasks.detail: Track A6. Wire the bundle mechanism + Payhip cross-sell / order-bump so Kit buyers see the next rung. Plumbing ships now; the real bundle product waits on Starter Pack / flagship (T10/T25).

tasks.title: Demand repointing to /learn/
tasks.detail: Track A7. Repoint product-promoting content CTAs (Pinterest / Reddit / Shorts) to /learn/; keep the Preply teaching funnel on autopilot. Never steer Preply students off-platform; do steer the content audience to the products.

tasks.title: Approve Starter Pack + flagship syllabus
tasks.detail: The gate for Track B. Rafael is brainstorming the syllabus in a dedicated chat (kickoff prompt in Syllabus Brainstorm Prompt.md). Locks each module: title, one-line transformation, 3-6 subtopics, key phrases/structures, mapped to the 3-layer method (L1 Survival, L2 Eu self-expression, L3 fluency via pattern expansion). Arrives as content JSON per the T20 schema.

tasks.title: Flagship course content build ($97-197)
tasks.detail: Track B. The full method end to end, L1 -> L2 -> L3: the product that replaces taking lessons with Rafael. Workbook PDFs + audio (TTS), optional short video/slides. Built through the T20 pipeline. Blocked on syllabus + pipeline.

tasks.title: Publish store: real buy sections + bundle
tasks.detail: Track B. Replace the store's coming-soon rung + teaser with real Starter Pack and flagship buy sections; publish the real bundle via the T22 plumbing. Blocked until the products exist.

tasks.title: Fix live Kit listing + covers wording
tasks.detail: Handoff open item. Live Payhip listing text + PDF covers still say 'spoken by a Brazilian'; audio is TTS, so no human-voice claim. Only Rafael can edit the live listing; re-rendering the covers is a separate render task.

tasks.title: Resolve open product decisions
tasks.detail: Handoff section 5, do not guess. (1) Flagship format: Payhip PDF+audio bundle now vs hosted membership later (recommend bundle first). (2) Email provider: Payhip $0 product vs MailerLite free. (3) Own domain: stay on GitHub Pages subpath vs dedicated domain.

tasks.title: URGENT: connect Stripe or PayPal in Payhip
tasks.detail: Both product pages (F5bcR Kit + nrNlU free phrases) show 'Seller is unable to receive payments' and render NO buy/download button. Checkout is blocked account-wide until a payment processor connects: no Kit sales AND no email capture can happen. Payhip > Settings > Payment details. Found by Fable5 2026-07-12 during live verification; explains 0 orders since launch.

log.what: Sprint opened. Kit data model parsed (T01 done).
Survival Kit PDFs built: dark + light, 13 pages, linked trial CTA (T02 done).
Sprint board built and deployed (T03 done).
Model routing set: Codex takes T04 (audio pack); Claude keeps T06/T10; Hermes keeps T07/T15.
T04 synthesis running: state file live, audio/ folders created.
Payhip listing copy + dual-cover product thumbnail shipped (T06 done).
T04 -> done.
T05 -> done.
Added T16: Opus orchestrator system.
T16 -> done.
T04 done: 272 audio files, 0 failures. package-kit.ps1 verified + zipped 6.8 MB (T05 done).
T11 -> done.
T07 Kit language QA complete: both PDFs reviewed, 0 issues. Kit is upload-ready.
T12 promoted backlog -> todo (funnel-measurable pillar).
T15 -> doing; Reddit/Quora mining notes created with queue-ready drafts.
T04 rev2: added slower audio tier (+127 files). Pack now 399 MP3s, 0 failures.
T10 progress: Starter System structure staged (manifest, 90-day TOC, gap list). Component builds still missing. Stays Doing.
Rafael approvals: Pinterest Batch 01 pins + Reddit/Quora drafts approved. T15 -> done.
Orchestrator cron confirmed live (n8n import + Telegram cred + CHAT_ID done). T16 fully set.
Added T17: rebuild favorite-capture trigger (Preply killed favorite notification emails).
T13 -> done: Pinterest app (ID 1587877) created, form finished, dev-support ticket submitted.
T17 built (Option B): MacroDroid -> Apps Script -> Sheet -> n8n -> template + Telegram + 72h follow-up.
T13 reviewer response handled: privacy.html rewritten with Pinterest-API disclosures + website claimed. App awaiting re-review.
T08 -> done: Survival Kit LIVE on Payhip (https://payhip.com/b/F5bcR). Unblocks T09.
PDF stamping ENABLED on Payhip. Anti-piracy layer live; T08 fully closed.
T14: completed Pinterest OAuth (write scopes) and proved the poster pipeline end-to-end. Blocked on Trial->Standard access upgrade (403 code 29).
T09 -> done: Survival Kit buy section shipped on the landing page (Payhip overlay button F5bcR, $19 vs $180-240/yr anchor). Audio described as three speeds, no human-voice claim.
T12 -> doing (landing analytics).

Sprint reframed to S02 'Flagship Sprint' (2026-07-08 -> 08-11, dated from the real project start) toward a standalone product business + launched flagship course, per the Fable5 Product Build Handoff.

S01 work folded onto the SAME board (same project, bigger goal): T01-T17 kept with original IDs. Carryovers stay open: T10 (now Starter Pack build, blocked on syllabus+pipeline), T12 analytics, T14 Pinterest Trial->Standard, T17 favorite-capture. New Track A/B work added as T18-T28.
T18 -> done.
T19 -> done.
T21 -> done.
T12 -> review.
T22 -> doing.
T20 -> doing.

Track A ships: /learn/ store LIVE (T18), email list live via Payhip $0 product nrNlU w/ 20% Kit cross-sell (T19, T22 plumbing), GoatCounter wired both pages pending Rafael registering site code speaklikeyourself (T12 review), SEO/OG/favicon polish live (T21). Pipeline build T20 -> doing.
T20 -> done.
T22 -> done.
T23 -> done.

T20 pipeline DONE: products/pipeline/ (content schema + validators, workbook PDF gen, edge-tts audio gen, gallery gen, listing gen, store buy-section gen). Survival Kit re-expressed in the schema rebuilds 1:1 (13pp PDFs, 399-file audio plan); mini module full-build incl. audio passed 0 failures. T22 plumbing done (cross-sell live, bundle waits on Track B). T23 done: pin queue + draft factory CTAs repointed to /learn/, trial-CTA wording removed from content drafts.
Added T29: URGENT: connect Stripe or PayPal in Payhip (rafael, 1 pts).
